author: dashboard-bootstrap
content: Fix #601 by capturing both stdout and stderr in the error bail messages of git_commit_in_cache_with_args / git_in_cache (both in shared_writer/core.rs and sync/core.rs — same shape, same bug in both modules). New format: 'git ... in cache failed (<exit>):\nstdout: <stdout>\nstderr: <stderr>'. Side effect: the existing 'nothing to commit' substring guards in write_commit_push / emit_compact_push now actually fire (they were dead code because err_str came from empty stderr). Skipping the optional 'git diff --cached --quiet' defense-in-depth — the issue marks it optional and the substring guards now do their job.
